required_fields.label: Project name
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Website Redesign Phase 2, ERP Implementation

required_fields.label: Client organization
required_fields.placeholder: Full legal entity name of the client

required_fields.label: Service provider organization
required_fields.placeholder: Full legal entity name of the provider

required_fields.label: Project description
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the project in detail. What is being delivered and why?

required_fields.label: Scope of work
required_fields.placeholder: List the specific tasks, deliverables, and services included in this engagement...

required_fields.label: Total budget / pricing
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., $150,000 fixed-price, T&M not to exceed $200,000

optional_fields.label: Key milestones
optional_fields.placeholder: List major project milestones with target dates...

optional_fields.label: Acceptance criteria
optional_fields.placeholder: How will deliverables be evaluated and accepted?

optional_fields.label: Project team structure
optional_fields.placeholder: Key roles from both provider and client side...

optional_fields.label: Explicitly out of scope
optional_fields.placeholder: What is NOT included in this engagement?

optional_fields.label: Key assumptions
optional_fields.placeholder: What assumptions is this SOW based on?

optional_fields.label: Payment schedule
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., 30% upfront, 40% at midpoint, 30% at completion

optional_fields.label: Change order process
optional_fields.placeholder: How will scope changes be handled?

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload any existing proposals, RFPs, or prior SOWs for reference
Upload technical requirements or specifications documents

sections.label: Purpose and Background
sections.instructions: State the business context, objectives, and rationale for this engagement. Reference the master agreement if applicable.

sections.label: Scope of Work
sections.instructions: Detailed description of all work to be performed. Break into numbered work streams or phases. Be explicit about boundaries.

sections.label: Deliverables
sections.instructions: Enumerate each deliverable with description, format, and delivery date. Use a numbered list or table format.

sections.label: Timeline and Milestones
sections.instructions: Project schedule with phases, milestones, dependencies, and key dates. Include a visual timeline or Gantt-style representation.

sections.label: Acceptance Criteria
sections.instructions: Define how each deliverable will be evaluated, the review period, and the process for acceptance or rejection.

sections.label: Roles and Responsibilities
sections.instructions: RACI or similar matrix defining responsibilities for both the provider and client teams. Include escalation paths.

sections.label: Pricing and Payment Terms
sections.instructions: Detailed pricing breakdown by phase or deliverable. Payment milestones, invoicing procedures, and expense policies.

sections.label: Assumptions and Constraints
sections.instructions: List all assumptions the SOW is based on and any constraints (technical, resource, timeline) that may affect delivery.

sections.label: Change Management
sections.instructions: Process for requesting, evaluating, approving, and implementing changes to scope, timeline, or budget.

sections.label: Governance and Communication
sections.instructions: Meeting cadence, status reporting requirements, escalation procedures, and project management tools.

sections.label: Signature Block
sections.instructions: Signature blocks for authorized representatives of both parties with name, title, date, and entity name.
